creator: bsd@dino.sk
text:
portaudit does not install on 10.0-BETA1:

===>  Cleaning for portaudit-0.6.1
===>   portaudit-0.6.1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by portaudit-0.6.1 for building
===>  Extracting for portaudit-0.6.1
===>  Patching for portaudit-0.6.1
===>  Configuring for portaudit-0.6.1
===>  Building for portaudit-0.6.1
===>  Installing for portaudit-0.6.1
/usr/sbin/pkg_info missing, please install port sysutils/pkg_install-devel
*** Error code 1

While a workaround is suggested here, I think this is a no go - pkg_install is for me an old pkg_* tool, which should not be on a pkgng box... Worth to mention is a fact there is no /usr/ports/sysutils/pkg_install-devel directory, making suggested workaround not usable. There is, however, ports-mgmt/pkg_install ports telling in its pkg-descr file following:

FreeBSD -CURRENT version of the pkg_install suite of tools for doing
maintenance of software packages.

However, trying to build it currently fails, too:

===> delete (all)
make[3]: "/usr/share/mk/bsd.sys.mk" line 98: Malformed conditional (${WARNS} <= 3)
make[3]: Fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue
make[3]: stopped in /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg_install/work/pkg_install-20120822/delete
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: Try to install ports-mgmt/portaudit port, try to build ports-mgmt/pkg_install port on a 10.0-BETA1 system
